title: Monthly Circular Punjab Praspar Hindu Kutamb Sahayak Bhandar, Lahore, ka Masik Patr
gloss: Monthly Circular of the Punjab Mutual Hindu Family Relief Fund, Volume VIII, No. 5, for August, 1910.
publisher: The Secretary of the fund named
notes: The Mutual Hindu Family Relief Fund circular again (Q3 carried it in three scripts) — Hindi edition 950 copies this issue.

title: Monthly Circular Punjab Praspar Hindu Kutamb, Sahaik Bhandar, Lahore, da Mahwari Rasala
gloss: Monthly Circular of the Punjab Mutual Hindu Family Relief Fund, Volume VIII, No. 5, for August, 1910.
publisher: The Secretary of the fund named
notes: Gurmukhi edition of the same circular, 1,050 copies — in Q4 the Punjabi edition prints MORE than the Hindi (950), reversing the Q3 hierarchy snapshot; consecutive regs 1240–1241 (no Urdu edition registered this quarter).
